title: dactylorhiza × altobracensis
intro: Dactylorhiza × altobracensis is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza fuchsii species. This orchid is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Dactylorhiza × altobracensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Dactylorhiza × altobracensis is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
